evals.prompt: A Verdify skills PR adds a new lifecycle skill and changes one adjacent skill description. Prepare the consensus audit packet.
evals.expected_output: Produces a review packet that scopes the issue and PR, records registered evidence, explains the new skill boundary, flags the adjacent skill change as a proposed or conflicting change unless authorized, and routes protected decisions to human approval.
assertions: The packet distinguishes accepted decisions, proposed changes, conflicts, and rejected suggestions.
Skill boundaries cite registered evidence and ADR references.
Machine reviewer findings are recorded separately from human or lane-owner votes.
Protected skill or North Star decisions are not marked approved without explicit human approval.

evals.prompt: Codex reports no required changes, Claude reports one blocking security objection, and the SRE lens is pending. Decide whether the packet can approve the plan.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the packet in review or blocked state, records the Claude finding as a machine-review required change, keeps the SRE vote pending, records the security objection route, and does not approve protected decisions.
assertions: Codex and Claude review loops remain separate evidence entries.
A blocking machine finding prevents a no-required-changes conclusion until resolved or routed.
Pending stakeholder-lens votes are preserved rather than inferred as approval.
The output names the unresolved issue owner or next lifecycle route.
